Generated Narrative: CodeSystem SGPersonaTypes

This case-insensitive code system http://smart.who.int/base/CodeSystem/SGPersonaTypes defines the following codes:

CodeDisplayDefinition
key Key PersonaKey Persona for workflows in this DAK
related Related PersonaRelated Personas that don't directly enact in any workflow in this DAK
system SystemDigital Systems that interact in this DAK
hardware Hardware DeviceHardware devices required to perform workflows in the DAK
